title: Disable aggressive animals for Overly-Realistic
description: An addon for Overly-Realistic to automatically disable aggressive animals
body:
This is an addon project for [Overly-Realistic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wilos-overly-realistic) that makes it so animals don't become aggressive, this also disables hogs from spawning

If Overly-Realistic isn't installed, this project won't do anything, make sure you have both!

This addon requires Overly-Realistic version v1.3.1 or above to work!
